description_long: This handbag features a boxy, cubic body with a semi-transparent, dark gray exterior and a thick, rectangular black border outlining its edges. The top of the bag is open, revealing a hollow interior, and it is equipped with a single, sturdy handle that arches over the opening. The handle is rendered in a dark brown color with lighter brown segments, giving it a blocky, pixelated appearance reminiscent of Minecraft-style graphics. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible pockets, zippers, or decorative elements. The bag's structure suggests it is rigid and maintains its shape even when empty. Its utilitarian look makes it suitable for carrying personal items in an urban environment.
description: A cubic, semi-transparent handbag with a thick black border and a single blocky brown handle, featuring a minimalist, rigid design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, thick black border, and the full arch of the brown handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular profile of the handle and the depth of the bag's body.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the handle arching over the open top and the black border visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the handle's attachment and the bag's depth.
attribute_strap_type: single short handle, rigid, non-adjustable, attached at two opposite top edges
attribute_closure_mechanism: none; the top is open with no visible closure mechanism
